title: Ok Jaanu
desc: Adi and Tara are ambitious people who fall in love after meeting at a wedding. They decide on a no-strings-attached live-in relationship, but doubt their decision when their careers pull them apart.

title: A Billion Colour Story
desc: The social realities of a country in crisis pose a challenge to his family's gentle existence.

title: Freddy
desc: The lines between love and obsession blur in this romantic thriller packed with unpredictable twists and sharp turns.

title: Shaadi Ke Side Effects
desc: After tying the knot and welcoming a baby, a man and woman navigate the ups and downs of their complicated relationship, discovering love, challenges, and unexpected growth along the way.

title: Bhuj The Pride Of India
desc: Historical drama depicts bravery, patriotism, and heroism during critical wartime missions, celebrating courage and sacrifice.

title: Tubelight
desc: Laxman, a feeble young man, has no other family except his brother, Bharat. He is heartbroken when his brother is drafted into the army after a war breaks out between India and China.

title: Junglee
desc: Raj, a vet from Mumbai, arrives at his father's elephant reserve for his mother's 10th death anniversary. However, things change after he is pitted in a war against the poachers.

title: Jolly LLB
desc: Lawyer Jagdish Tyagi aka Jolly attempts to earn 6 innocent wage earners their rights and fights the monopolistic behaviour of the rich.

title: Aksar
desc: Rajveer hatches a clever scheme to frame his wife for cheating, enlisting Ricky to charm her. Will his plan succeed, or will it backfire in unexpected ways?

title: Kya Kool Hai Hum
desc: Catch nonstop promos, music, and fillers from your favorite movies and shows! Enjoy a seamless stream of entertainment that'll keep you hooked and entertained for hours.

title: Dheet Patangey
desc: Four friends chase cricket dreams after 1983 and 2011 wins.
